documents.file: 2025全球人工智能技术应用洞察报告.pdf
key_assertions: weak slide-export bookmarks must be cleaned or rejected before acceptance
flat slide outline is acceptable when it reflects the source document
garbled PDF text must not be used as final node content
node content must come from OCR-backed PageTextMap

documents.file: 2025年度重庆市人工智能应用场景典型案例集（压缩版）.pdf
key_assertions: full document OCR must cover all 44 pages
TOC must not collapse to a single full-document node
TOC items must not mostly map to TOC pages

documents.file: 2025年第五范式-人工智能驱动的科技创新报告.pdf
expected_top_level: 百花齐放的大模型时代
大模型辅助的科学假设生成
大模型辅助的论文与项目
key_assertions: Chinese outline numbers must not be treated as physical page numbers
chapter internals should be built by LLM from page snippets

documents.file: 2026AI应用专题：各大厂新模型持续迭代，重视AI应用板块投资机会.pdf
key_assertions: high-quality visible TOC should use rule extraction first
01-04 suffixes are section numbers rather than physical pages
duplicate visible TOC pages must be deduplicated

documents.file: 2026年AI Agent智能体技术发展报告.pdf
key_assertions: PDF links should produce about 117 TOC entries
six chapter structure must be preserved
second chapter must not be nested under chapter one

documents.file: 2026年快消行业AI营销增长白皮书.pdf
key_assertions: pages 3-5 should be OCR repaired
physical page 4 should be detected as a visible TOC page
Part numbers are section numbers rather than physical pages

documents.file: AI眼镜关键技术与产业生态研究报告（2025年）.pdf
key_assertions: visible TOC pages should be pages 4-5
high-quality visible TOC should use rule extraction first

documents.file: OpenAI深度报告：大模型王者，引领AGI之路.pdf
key_assertions: visible TOC pages should be pages 2-3
figure and table catalogs must not affect main TOC page mapping
embedded outline should be accepted as page-level slide outline
flat TOC is acceptable for this slide-like report

documents.file: 人工智能安全治理研究报告（2025年）.pdf
key_assertions: embedded bookmarks must not be accepted if figure catalog is missing
visible TOC rule extraction should be tried before LLM

documents.file: 清华大学：职业教育人工智能应用发展报告（2024-2025）.pdf
key_assertions: physical page 2 should be detected as a no-page-number TOC
chapter internals should be built by LLM from page snippets

documents.file: 生成式人工智能服务合规备案指南（2026年）.pdf
key_assertions: bookmarks and PDF links must be collected independently and merged
embedded TOC must preserve main/table/figure sections
